member.name: T:Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.ICassette
member.summary: Represents the interface for cassette data in the plate leveler.

member.summary: Gets or sets the active flag.

member.summary: Gets or sets the bearing diameter [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the cassette number.

member.summary: Gets or sets the distance A [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the distance B [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum adjustment [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum motor torque [Nm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum selectable thickness [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the cassette number.

member.summary: Gets or sets the number of center waves.

member.summary: Gets or sets the number of edge waves.

member.summary: Gets or sets the evaluation value for edge wave [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the evaluation value for ski [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the evaluation value for tilting [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum height of center wave [mm].

member.summary: Occurs when a property value changes.

member.summary: Represents the interface for flatness data of a plate.

member.summary: Represents the interface for leveler data, including process and plate properties.

member.summary: Represents limitation data for the plate leveler.

member.summary: Gets or sets the conveyor speed [m/min].

member.summary: Gets or sets the drive value [kW].

member.summary: Gets or sets the elastic modulus [MPa].

member.summary: Gets or sets the friction coefficient [-].

member.summary: Gets or sets the gear efficiency factor [-].

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether fault compensation is enabled.

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum width [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum yield point [MPa].

member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum coil length [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum plastification [%].

member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum width [mm].

member.summary: Gets or sets the plastification [%].

member.summary: Gets or sets the roll friction coefficient [-].

member.summary: Gets or sets the roll friction moment [Nm].

member.summary: Occurs when a property value changes.

member.name: T:Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.PriorityComparer
member.summary: Compares two priority data items for sorting.

member.name: M:Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.PriorityComparer.Compare(Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.IPriorityData,Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.IPriorityData)
member.summary: Compares two objects and returns a value indicating whether one is less than, equal to, or greater than the other.
member.returns: A signed integer that indicates the relative values of x and y.

member.summary: Represents the type of stood bolt used in the leveler.

member.summary: Preleveling stood bolt type.

member.name: F:Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.StoodBoltType.TR160
member.summary: TR160 stood bolt type.

member.summary: TR250 stood bolt type.

member.name: F:Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.StoodBoltType.TR180
member.summary: TR180 stood bolt type.

member.name: T:Level2.PlateLeveler.Model.IPlateCalc
member.summary: Interface for calculating plate properties and leveler data.

member.name: M:Level2.PlateLeveler.Model.IPlateCalc.CalcLevelerData(Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.ISettingsData,Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.ICassette,Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.IPreSettingsOutlet,Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.ILimitationData,Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.StoodBoltType)
member.summary: Calculates the leveler data based on the provided settings, cassette, outlet, limitations, and bolt type.
member.remarks: The method iteratively adjusts the plastification value and recalculates the leveler data until the constraints defined by the cassette and limitations are satisfied or a maximum iteration count is reached. If the is , the method throws a .
member.param: The initial settings data used for the calculation.
The cassette data containing maximum motor power and leveling pressure constraints.
The outlet data used to determine pre-settings for the calculation.
The limitation data specifying minimum plastification and other constraints.
The type of bolt used, which influences the calculation constants.
member.returns: An object containing the calculated leveler data, including updated plastification, leveling pressure, and other relevant properties.
member.exception: Thrown if is , as this bolt type is not supported.

member.name: M:Level2.PlateLeveler.Model.IPlateCalc.CalcPlateComparison(Level2.PlateLeveler.DataTypes.ISettingsData,System.Single)
member.summary: Calculates the plastification value for a plate based on its dimensions and range constraints.
member.remarks: This method checks whether the plate's thickness and width fall within the specified range constraints. If the dimensions are outside the ranges, the plastification value is updated to the provided value.
member.param: The settings data containing the plate's dimensions and range constraints.
The plastification value to apply if the plate's dimensions are outside the specified ranges.
member.returns: An object representing the updated settings data. If the plate's dimensions are within the specified ranges, the original is returned unchanged; otherwise, the plastification value is updated.
